
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}} combination.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: itsumi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão

==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit'''
|-
!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st millennium|1=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium|1=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|55|en|55|qid=Q4640593|lt=55|1=55}}
* {{ill|115|en|115|qid=Q396116|lt=115|1=115}}
* {{ill|175|en|175|qid=Q31275|lt=175|1=175}}
* {{ill|235|en|235|qid=Q31228|lt=235|1=235}}
* {{ill|295|en|295|qid=Q31925|lt=295|1=295}}
* {{ill|355|en|355|qid=Q33588|lt=355|1=355}}
* {{ill|415|en|415|qid=Q30491|lt=415|1=415}}
* {{ill|475|en|475|qid=Q30785|lt=475|1=475}}
* {{ill|535|en|535|qid=Q31019|lt=535|1=535}}
* {{ill|595|en|595|qid=Q33847|lt=595|1=595}}
* {{ill|655|en|655|qid=Q30045|lt=655|1=655}}
* {{ill|715|en|715|qid=Q23528|lt=715|1=715}}
* {{ill|775|en|775|qid=Q30075|lt=775|1=775}}
* {{ill|835|en|835|qid=Q23894|lt=835|1=835}}
* {{ill|895|en|895|qid=Q31119|lt=895|1=895}}
* {{ill|955|en|955|qid=Q23579|lt=955|1=955}}
|
* {{ill|1015|en|1015|qid=Q19245|lt=1015|1=1015}}
* {{ill|1075|en|1075|qid=Q19439|lt=1075|1=1075}}
* {{ill|1135|en|1135|qid=Q19594|lt=1135|1=1135}}
* {{ill|1195|en|1195|qid=Q19745|lt=1195|1=1195}}
* {{ill|1255|en|1255|qid=Q5501|lt=1255|1=1255}}
* {{ill|1315|en|1315|qid=Q5742|lt=1315|1=1315}}
* {{ill|1375|en|1375|qid=Q6277|lt=1375|1=1375}}
* {{ill|1435|en|1435|qid=Q6362|lt=1435|1=1435}}
* {{ill|1495|en|1495|qid=Q6695|lt=1495|1=1495}}
* {{ill|1555|en|1555|qid=Q6579|lt=1555|1=1555}}
* {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}}
* {{ill|1675|en|1675|qid=Q7624|lt=1675|1=1675}}
* {{ill|1735|en|1735|qid=Q6984|lt=1735|1=1735}}
* {{ill|1795|en|1795|qid=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}}
* {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}}
* {{ill|1915|en|1915|qid=Q2084|lt=1915|1=1915}}
* {{ill|1975|en|1975|qid=Q2479|lt=1975|1=1975}}
|
* {{ill|2035|en|2035|qid=Q12127|lt=2035|1=2035}}
* {{ill|2095|en|2095|qid=Q972426|lt=2095|1=2095}}
* {{ill|2155|en|2155|qid=Q13191419|lt=2155|1=2155}}
* [[:en:2215|2215]]
* [[:en:2275|2275]]
* [[:en:2335|2335]]
* [[:en:2395|2395]]
* {{ill|2455|en|2455|qid=Q52706718|lt=2455|1=2455}}
* [[2515]]
* [[2575]]
* [[:en:2635|2635]]
* [[2695]]
* [[2755]]
* [[:en:2815|2815]]
* [[:en:2875|2875]]
* [[:en:2935|2935]]
* [[:en:2995|2995]]
|}

==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|qid=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|qid=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|qid=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days.
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Wood Rabbit|qq=ja|乙卯|version=86230580|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q904791|af|Houtkonyn (astrologie)|cdo|Ĭk-māu|de|Holz-Hase|hak|Yet-mâu|ja|乙卯|ko|을묘|vi|Ất Mão|za|Ietmaux|zh-min-nan|It-báu|zh-yue|乙卯|zh|乙卯|zh-min-nan|Kí-chhá|zh-yue|己未|cdo|Kí-cṳ̄de|nds|Wasser-Ziegenevi|de|Yin Wood Rabbit|fr|Lièvre de bois|af|Waterbok (astrologie)|de|Wasser-Ziegeneen|en|Water Goat|fr|Chèvre de eauboishak|it|Ki-chṳ́id|ko|계미|vi|Kỷ Mùi|za|Keiceij|zh|己未|ar|Yin Wood Rabbit}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
